steps.title: Set up the angle sum
steps.content:
The interior angles of a triangle sum to $180^\circ$. Use the three angle measures from the problem.
$$62+90+\frac{k}{2}=180$$

steps.title: Solve for k
steps.content:
Combine the known angles, then isolate $k$.
$$152+\frac{k}{2}=180$$
$$\frac{k}{2}=28$$
$$k=56$$
The answer is C.
